sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 15:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 15:1
items.html: It is the departure of lights to the Emanator that was made in the worlds for the first time, which is in Partzuf Keter of AK. (Item 60)
